title: GSC Indexing Movement Audit

movements.explanation: More pages moved from discovered→indexed. Internal links + content upgrades (Phase 17-20) helping Google trust pages.

Huge 73% drop. Likely causes: (1) Thin tool/scenario pages being de-prioritized by Google after they were removed from sitemap or noindexed in prior cleanup. (2) Google stopped discovering low-value parameterized pages. (3) Discovery queue purged stale URLs.
54 new noindexed pages. Most likely: ~2,000 formula scenario pages were noindexed during Phase 12-14 V2 cleanup. Google is now reporting them. Needs verification that all 70 are intentional.
10 more pages crawled but Google decided not to index. Could be tool/scenario dupes or low-quality pages. Need URL identification.
2 new 404s. Could be deleted pages or broken links. Verify and fix or 410.
Normal growth as more pages reference parent calculators. Not a concern.

overall_verdict: NET_POSITIVE — indexed pages growing (+14), discovered bloat dropping (-73%), noindex increase looks intentional (V2 cleanup). Minor crawled/404 increases need audit.
